@babiescanfly posted on 2024-04-04T23:25:44:

# Compatibility Report
- Name of the game with compatibility issues: God of War
- Steam AppID of the game: 1593500

## System Information
- GPU: AMD Radeon Graphics
- Video driver version: 3.6
- Kernel version: 6.1.52-valve19-1-neptune-61 (64-bit)
- Link to full system information report as [Gist](https://gist.github.com/):https://gist.github.com/babiescanfly/fef74daedc9ba3c5136426b368b1b1ff
- Proton version: 8

## I confirm:
- [x] that I haven't found an existing compatibility report for this game.
- [x] that I have checked whether there are updates for my system available.

<!-- Please add `PROTON_LOG=1 %command%` to the game's launch options and
attach the generated $HOME/steam-$APPID.log to this issue report as a file.
(Proton logs compress well if needed.)-->

## Symptoms <!-- What's the problem? -->
Even if atmospherics in the graphics menu are set to anything other than low (including presets) the game will still use the low version. If a custom setting is used the game will always reset atmospherics to low.

## Reproduction
Always occours. Can't find an instance where it doesn't.

- Video driver version: 4.6 (Compatibility Profile) Mesa 24.1.2
- Kernel version: 6.6.39
- Proton version: 9.0-202

## I confirm:
- [x] that I haven't found an existing compatibility report for this game.
- [x] that I have checked whether there are updates for my system available.

<!-- Please add `PROTON_LOG=1 %command%` to the game's launch options and
attach the generated $HOME/steam-$APPID.log to this issue report as a file.
(Proton logs compress well if needed.)-->

## Symptoms <!-- What's the problem? -->

![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/7e90d8bb-ad7a-4a3d-9bb8-307d2ac28e5a)
Unable to select a different screenshot folder within the game using the spawned Proton folder select window as there's no clear `Select` button. Right-clicking the folder and the options `Select`, `Open`, or `Explore` generates an error dialog: `There is no Windows program configured to open this type of file.`

## Reproduction

* Load a save (or anew)
* Enter screenshot mode `F11`
* Press `Q` to change screenshot location
* Try to use the dialog to pick a folder.

compatibility_report:
Kingdom Come: Deliverance II – freeze after Maleshov exit cutscene

Issue transferred from https://github.com/ValveSoftware/Proton/issues/9128.
@NoahPladys posted on 2025-10-22T21:59:34:

# Compatibility Report
- Name of the game with compatibility issues: Kingdom Come: Deliverance II
- Steam AppID of the game: 1771300

## System Information
- GPU: Nvidia RTX 5070 Ti
- Video driver version: 580.95.05 (also tested 580.82.09)
- Kernel version: Linux 6.17.3-arch2-1
- Link to full system information report as [Gist](https://gist.github.com/): [System Info](https://gist.github.com/NoahPladys/ca0596cdd6fb18e493f4796a318ea79d) [Runtime Report](https://gist.github.com/NoahPladys/0f9b51fc3e44496655a607bbeda1658a)
- Proton version: Proton Experimental, (also Proton Hotfix, Proton 9.0 - 4, Proton-GE 10-21)

## I confirm:
- [X] that I haven't found an existing compatibility report for this game.
- [X] that I have checked whether there are updates for my system available.

<!-- Please add `PROTON_LOG=1 %command%` to the game's launch options and
attach the generated $HOME/steam-$APPID.log to this issue report as a file.
(Proton logs compress well if needed.)-->

## Symptoms <!-- What's the problem? -->

When exiting the game at Maleshov, it is supposed to play a cutscene, fade to black, and fade into a new cutscene. I get the first cutscene, a fade to black (followed by a ~2 second freeze of any video on my pc, e.g. a youtube video playing on my second monitor), and then just that same black screen for the entirety of the session. At this point there is nothing to do and I have to close the game. Skipping the cutscene before it has finished works and just bring you right back in the game. Seems like it just breaks on the cutscene transition.

## Reproduction

Just exit the gate at Maleshov after clearing the guards and signalling Capon to come down. Do not skip the cutscene

## Troubleshooting attempted

- Verified game files
- Switched Proton versions (Experimental, Hotfix, 9.0, GE 10-21)
- Cleared shadercache + rebuilt prefix
- Tried both driver versions 580.95 ↔ 580.82.09
- Disabled NVAPI (DXVK_ENABLE_NVAPI=0)
- Enabled PROTON_MEDIA_USE_GST=1

One exception that kind of fixed it (but made the game unplayable), is forcing DX11 with PROTON_USE_DXVK=1 DXVK_ASYNC=1 %command% -dx11. This gave me a black screen, but by blindly clicking and moving to the gate, I managed to start the cutscene and by the audio of the clips I heard that the second clip started playing, so it must be something with DX12
symptom_summary:
用户在《王国来临：救赎 II》中经历了在Maleshov出口切换场景时的冻结问题，游戏在切换到新过场动画时只显示黑屏，导致无法继续游戏。 

Tags: Freeze, Black Screen, Cutscene Issue

compatibility_report:
# Compatibility Report
- Name of the game with compatibility issues: F1 23
- Steam AppID of the game: 2108330

## System Information
- GPU: RTX 2060
- Driver/LLVM version: nvidia 535.54.03
- Kernel version: 6.3.8-200.fc38.x86_64
- Link to full system information report as [Gist](https://gist.github.com/): https://gist.github.com/caoimhebyrne/39496d498a592edfb61d4e0e13377adb
- Proton version: experimental-8.0-20230627

## I confirm:
- [x] that I haven't found an existing compatibility report for this game.
- [x] that I have checked whether there are updates for my system available.

[steam-2108330.log](https://github.com/ValveSoftware/Proton/files/11940837/steam-2108330.log)

## Symptoms <!-- What's the problem? -->

The game seems to start fine, but once you get through the title sequence and the "Press any button" screen, the game will lock after it transitions to the News screen.

It seems to do this automatically for me, but I played on Windows before, so maybe it's doing it automatically since I haven't played in a while.

I've tried spamming buttons before the freeze happens to try and close the news screen, but that doesn't seem to work. Whilst the screen has frozen, I can still hear audio in the background playing properly.

Here's a screenshot of where my game freezes for reference:

![screenshot](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/806461073199988737/1125523893587816448/image.png)

**Some other relevant notes**:
- I am running under an up-to-date release of Fedora 38 as of July 3rd at 9pm GMT+1.
- Steam is running under Flatpak, with `flatpak update` saying that there is 'Nothing to do'.
- I verified the game's installation files with Steam to make sure there was no issue there, and it didn't raise any complaints.

## Reproduction

1. Open the game
2. Press any button when it asks you to
3. Wait for the news screen to automatically open (or press the "News" button, maybe?)
4. Observe that the game freezes, GNOME eventually asks you if you want to force quit it on GNOME distributions.
symptom_summary:
游戏在标题序列和“按任意键”屏幕后正常启动，但在转到新闻屏幕时会锁定。尽管屏幕冻结，背景音频仍然正常播放。

**Tags:** Freezing, Audio Playing, UI Lockup

compatibility_report:
# Compatibility Report
- Name of the game with compatibility issues: Athanasy
- Steam AppID of the game: 1769320

## System Information
- Steam Deck LCD 256gb
- Proton version: Tried with both the latest Proton 8 and Proton Experimental

## I confirm:
- [x] that I haven't found an existing compatibility report for this game.
- [x] that I have checked whether there are updates for my system available.

## Symptoms <!-- What's the problem? -->
Game boots and you are able to interact with the main menu with no issues. Once the game starts, the app freezes up after a minute or two playing, with no option for recovery except exiting the app forcefully from the game mode overlay.

I tried with Proton 8.0 and proton experimental, and there wasn't any difference. I am not able to repro the issue on windows, which is the same build proton should be using.


## Reproduction
-Open the game
-start a new game.
-play for around a minute or two (usually it happened to me when I reached either the second or third image.)
symptom_summary:
用户在游戏《Athanasy》中遇到的问题是，游戏在启动后可以正常进入主菜单，但在开始游戏后大约一到两分钟后会冻结，无法恢复，只能强制退出应用程序。 

Tags: Freezes, App Crash, Unresponsive

compatibility_report:
# Compatibility Report
- Name of the game with compatibility issues: Reaxxion
- Steam AppID of the game: 15950

## System Information
- GPU: AMD Radeon RX 6800 XT
- Driver/LLVM version: Mesa 21.2.5-1
- Kernel version: 5.15.6-2-MANJARO (64-bit)
- Link to full system information report as [Gist](https://gist.github.com/): https://gist.github.com/DanielR-I/56d1883aac640d5304c088b0d0c77f58
- Proton version: Experimental

## I confirm:
- [x] that I haven't found an existing compatibility report for this game.
- [x] that I have checked whether there are updates for my system available.

[steam-15950.zip](https://github.com/ValveSoftware/Proton/files/7698089/steam-15950.zip)

## Symptoms
Reaxxion has stopped working. During Loading/Initializing dialog a second dialog opens stating "OLE Error 8000FFFF".

## Reproduction
I did not find Reaxxion in Protondb... but searches there lead to anther title (Dead Space 2) where others reported the same OLE error ... referencing "msxml6" as the solution. i.e. "protontricks <gameid> msxml6" for "Dead Space 2"

Reaxxion worked with earlier versions of Proton Experimental.... but now all Proton versions I've tried (as a troubleshooting measure) fail to successfully load the game; presenting the same "OLE Error 8000FFFF" dialog over top of the game's initial "Initialization" dialog.
symptom_summary:
用户在加载/初始化对话框时遇到问题，游戏《Reaxxion》停止工作，并出现“OLE Error 8000FFFF”的错误提示。 

Tags: Crash, Initialization Error, OLE Error

## Symptoms 
When loading the map the loading screen shows [graphic glitches and freezes](https://steamuserimages-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/2050863993574072738/D9A777BB7DD07E4E0B6A363A5A4704218AD071F0/?imw=5000&imh=5000&ima=fit&impolicy=Letterbox&imcolor=%23000000&letterbox=false).

compatibility_report:
# Compatibility Report
- Name of the game with compatibility issues: Worldwide Rush Demo
- Steam AppID of the game: 3508140

## System Information
- GPU: NVidia RTX 3080 LHR
- Video driver version: 4.6.0 NVIDIA 570.153.02
- Kernel version: 6.15.0-2
- Link to full system information report as [Gist](https://gist.github.com/): https://gist.github.com/Creat/d326824b876eff07b54c6f1db8392290
- Proton version: 10.0-1 (beta)

## I confirm:
- [x] that I haven't found an existing compatibility report for this game.
- [x] that I have checked whether there are updates for my system available.

<!-- Please add `PROTON_LOG=1 %command%` to the game's launch options and
attach the generated $HOME/steam-$APPID.log to this issue report as a file.
(Proton logs compress well if needed.)-->

## Symptoms <!-- What's the problem? -->
The game/demo does launch, but only shows a complete white screen. Alt-Tab'ing doesn't change or help, it keeps showing nothing but a white sceren. System is otherwise still responsive. (all) other games I've tried work just fine on this system.
Even after waiting a long time (many minutes) the white screen doesn't change. The game was eventually stopped using the "Stop" button in Steam.
Since my system uses Wayland by default, I also tried it from an X11 session, but same result.

## Reproduction
This happens 100% of the time for me, no matter what Proton version I try (including but not limited to: 10 (beta), 9.0-4, experimental, hotfix).
I also know it starts just fine on a (physical hardware) Steam Deck.

symptom_summary:
用户在尝试启动《Worldwide Rush Demo》时，只看到一个完全白色的屏幕，无法进行任何操作，Alt-Tab切换也无效，系统其他部分仍然响应正常。即使等待很长时间，白屏问题依然存在。

**Tags:** White Screen, Unresponsive, Launch Issue
